chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-197 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 19-08-2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate along with both petitioners. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G and Naheed Akhtar, Assistant P.G a/w Inspector Ghulam Qadir, SHO, P.S, Mehrabpur. **** Learned Law Officers file statements on behalf of official respondents No.4&5 and SHO, P.S, Mehrabpur, which are taken on record and copies whereof are provided to learned counsel for the petitioners. Petitioner No.1 Mst. Rabia Sani is present and states that she being sui juris contracted marriage with Rasool Bux (petitioner No.2) without any pressure, compulsion and coercion, which has caused very much annoyed to her family members who are issuing threats for dire consequences. She further states that she has not been abducted or enticed away by anyone including the petitioner No.2; however, petitioners apprehend that petitioner No.2 and his family members will be booked in malicious false criminal cases at the hands of private respondents. Learned Law Officers submit that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. 2 After such statement, learned counsel for petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to both the petitioners, as and when they needed.

Learned Law Officers submit that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. 2 After such statement, learned counsel for petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to both the petitioners, as and when they needed. Let copy of this order be communicated to SSP, Nausharho Feroze by fax for information and compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
